name: Shrimp Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion in butter over low heat until tender, about 1-2 minutes.
2. Add shrimp and stir gently for 2 minutes. Season with 1/4 teaspoon salt and add white wine. Simmer for about 1 minute. Let cool.
3. Beat eggs, milk, cocktail sauce, 1/4 teaspoon salt, and a dash of pepper in a bowl.
4. Gradually fold in the shrimp.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie shell. Sprinkle cheese evenly over the top.
6. Bake for 25-30 minutes. For a firmer quiche, use half-and-half or heavy cream instead of milk.
